sentences.english: Let me tell you about my family. There are four people in my family — my parents, my older sister, and me. My dad works as an engineer at a car company.
sentences.korean: 제 가족을 소개할게요. 가족이 네 명인데 — 부모님, 언니, 저예요. 아빠는 자동차 회사에서 엔지니어로 일하세요.

sentences.english: He's really good with machines and he loves fixing things around the house. My mom is a kindergarten teacher. She's very patient and creative.
sentences.korean: 기계를 정말 잘 다루시고 집안 수리하는 걸 좋아하세요. 엄마는 유치원 선생님인데, 아주 인내심 있고 창의적이세요.

sentences.english: She always makes beautiful art projects with her students. My older sister's name is Jina. She's twenty-five and works at a marketing company in Seoul.
sentences.korean: 항상 학생들과 아름다운 미술 작품을 만드세요. 언니 이름은 지나인데, 25살이고 서울의 마케팅 회사에서 일해요.

sentences.english: We're very close even though she doesn't live at home anymore. We video-call each other almost every day. I'm the youngest in the family.
sentences.korean: 언니가 더 이상 집에 살지 않지만 아주 가까워요. 거의 매일 영상통화해요. 저는 집에서 막내예요.

sentences.english: Everyone says I look like my dad, but I have my mom's personality — warm and a little bit talkative.
sentences.korean: 모두 아빠를 닮았다고 하는데, 성격은 엄마를 닮았어요 — 따뜻하고 약간 수다스러운 편이에요.
